title: Reasoning Under Uncertainty: How LLMs Handle What They Don't Know
subtitle: Calibration, confidence, and truthfulness in AI reasoning.
description: An essay on uncertainty-aware AI reasoning, calibration, and evaluation for research-grade systems.
excerpt: The gap between confidence and calibration is where hallucinations live. Exploring how modern language models express uncertainty — and how we can make them better at it.
hero_caption: Confidence and uncertainty represented as layered probability fields.
